master_plan.worker_prompt: Fix CRITICAL structural flaw: preflop nit + postflop calling station. Widen preflop range, add postflop folding logic, increase bet sizing.
Tune numeric constants: lower preflop fold thresholds, raise bet sizing multipliers, increase aggression factors.

reviewer_feedback: Workers went beyond scope: removed existing features (SPR profiling, donk betting, river thin value, barrel profiling, CBet adjustments), consolidated 23→11 files, added unsolicited anti-bot4 detection. strategy.py at 993 lines and postflop.py at 999 lines dangerously close to 1000-line limit. Core structural changes (5-tier preflop, postflop folding) are what was requested.
